meta.transformationNotes: Expenditure sourced from Iowa Checkbook (mydata.iowa.gov, Socrata dataset cyqb-8ina) aggregated by department for the reporting month. Revenue sourced from Iowa Tax Receipts and Refunds (dataset s98w-ib9t); amounts converted from millions to whole dollars. Revenue is net of refunds (receipts minus refunds per category). Intra-governmental transfers excluded.
